Response ratio is written as R = A_native / A_IS.
Sample concentration is written as C_sample = ((R - b) / m) x DF.
Detection limit is written as LOD = t_(n-1,0.99) x SD_low.
Expanded uncertainty is written as U95 = 2 x sqrt(u_cal^2 + u_rep^2 + u_vol^2 + u_rec^2).
